name: Burton's Landing State Forest Campground (Au Sable Holy Water)
notes: Carry-down access at the top of the flies-only Holy Water; Recreation Passport required.

name: Tippy Dam Recreation Area (Manistee River)
notes: Ramp plus accessible fishing pier below the dam; Recreation Passport required.

name: Proud Lake Recreation Area (Huron River)
notes: Spring trout water below Proud Lake dam; Recreation Passport required.

name: Yates Park (Clinton River)
notes: Popular reach for DNR adult trout stockings near Yates Cider Mill.

name: Spring Mill Pond (Island Lake Recreation Area)
notes: Stocked pond with bank access; Recreation Passport required.
